Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course explicitly covers '資訊安全法令法規' and '國際隱私保護趨勢', and '資訊安全倫理與法律理解', directly supporting rule of law (16.3), accountable institutions (16.6), and fundamental freedoms (16.10).
